executives.name: Justin Dustzadeh
executives.background: Justin Dustzadeh has served as our Chief Technology Officer since 2019. Prior to joining Equinix, he held technology leadership roles at Visa, Huawei, and Ericsson.

tenure_dates.title: Head of Global Network & Software Platform

executives.name: Nikesh Arora
executives.background: Nikesh Arora has served as our Chief Executive Officer and Chairman of our Board since June 2018. Prior to joining us, Mr. Arora served as President and Chief Operating Officer of SoftBank Group Corp. from October 2014 to June 2016. From 2004 to 2014, Mr. Arora held various positions at Google Inc., most recently as Senior Vice President and Chief Business Officer.

executives.name: Turqi Alnowaiser
executives.background: Mr. Alnowaiser has served as a director since 2021. He is the Deputy Governor and Head of International Investments at the Public Investment Fund (PIF) of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

executives.name: Ursula Burns
executives.background: Ursula Burns is an Independent Director. She was the Chairman and CEO of Xerox Corporation and VEON Ltd. She is a member of the National Academy of Engineering and serves on several other boards including Uber and Endeavor.

board_of_directors.name: Ronald Sugar
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Sugar is the former Chairman and CEO of Northrop Grumman Corporation, where he served from 2003 to 2010.
